name: Microwave Broil With Time Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for the MWO broil with Time feature.  If not set, it should read FF.

data.name: Broil With Time Mode Current Setting

comment: Microwave Broil With Time Mode - Current Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Turntable Setting
description: The current setting of the turntable.  If MWO supports turntable on/off is defined in 0x5C01.
comment: Turntable Setting: Boolean writable switch.

name: Microwave Melt Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available sub menus for the Melt Mode.
comment: Microwave Melt Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Melt Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for Melt mode. Must set the type of food and the amount of that item in integer ounces.
comment: Microwave Melt Mode - Current Setting: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Steam Cook Mode - Available Settings
description: List of available sub menus for the Steam Cook Mode.
comment: Microwave Steam Cook Mode - Available Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Microwave Steam Cook Mode - Current Setting
description: Current setting for Steam Cook mode. Must set the type of food and the amount of that item in cups.
comment: Microwave Steam Cook Mode - Current Setting: Multi-field enum, may need custom handling.

name: Staged Microwave Data Uid
description: This identifies the cavity parameters as single id for remote requests to 0x5C3D. A value of 0 should be considered invalid.
comment: Staged Microwave Data Uid: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Staged Microwave Cook Request
description:
Requests a staged microwaved cook. Summary of the fields:
- Stages: There can be up to 10 stages. Each stage should have a power level and cook time. Reserved data exists for future use.
- Cook Action: Tells the device what to do with the cook request. The update action at enum value of 2 is not supported at the moment.
- Recipe ID: identifies the stage content so that it is unique.
comment: Staged Microwave Cook Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Staged Microwave Cook Status
description: The status of the currently running staged cook. This is supplemental to the Microwave state (0x5C11).

data.name: Remaining Stage Cook Time In Seconds

comment: Staged Microwave Cook Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Customer Feedback Request
description: Request to enable or disable different customer feedback
comment: Customer Feedback Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Customer Feedback Status
description: Current state of the customer feedback enables
comment: Customer Feedback Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Wireless Connection State
description: Specifies whether wireless module is connected or not.
comment: Auto-suggested: Wireless Connection State

name: Downgrade Count
description:
Counter that specifies the number of Appliance OTA Downgrades that can be performed.
This ERD is used to support Repetitive Appliance OTA Tests that loop between 2 eAUI Versions.
The Downgrades will only be allowed while in the Field Test Environment.
The WIFI Module will decrement the counter as the downgrades are performed.
comment: Downgrade Count: Counter/count sensor.

name: Bluetooth Low Energy Master Network Status
description: Reading this will give you the current network status and writing this will control the network status.
comment: Bluetooth Low Energy Master Network Status: Enum writable select.

comment: Bluetooth Hestan Pan Status - Device 1: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

comment: Bluetooth Hestan Pan Status - Device 2: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

comment: Bluetooth Hestan Pan Status - Device 3: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

description: Data packet from a Hestan Cue peripheral device
comment: Bluetooth Hestan Pan Status - Device 4: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Wireless Sensor Data - Sensor 0
description: This ERD contains data from a wireless (e.g. BLE) sensor. The used length of the sensor data payload is determined by the sensor type.

values.0: BLE Mesh Water Leak Sensor - GEA
values.1: BLE Advertise Mode Water Leak Sensor - GEA

comment: Wireless Sensor Data - Sensor 0: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

description: This ERD contains data from a wireless (e.g. BLE) sensor. The used length of the sensor data payload is determined by the sensor type.

values.0: BLE Mesh Water Leak Sensor - GEA
values.1: BLE Advertise Mode Water Leak Sensor - GEA

comment: Wireless Sensor Data - Sensor 1: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

description: This ERD contains data from a wireless (e.g. BLE) sensor. The used length of the sensor data payload is determined by the sensor type.

values.0: BLE Mesh Water Leak Sensor - GEA
values.1: BLE Advertise Mode Water Leak Sensor - GEA

comment: Wireless Sensor Data - Sensor 2: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

values.1: BLE Advertise Mode Water Leak Sensor - GEA

name: Sensor Provision Request
description: This is the request to enable or disable sensor provisioning

values.0: BLE Mesh Water Leak Sensor - GEA
values.1: BLE Advertise Mode Water Leak Sensor - GEA

comment: Sensor Provision Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Sensor Provision Result
description: This is the result of sensor provisioning. Provisioned slot/index is from 0 - 4 but it could be extended in the future if we need to support more than 5 sensors.
comment: Sensor Provision Result: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Sensor Removal Request
description: This is the request to remove a provisioned sensor
comment: Sensor Removal Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Sensor Removal Result
description: This is the sensor removal result. The removed slot is from 0 to 4, and could be extended in the future if we need to support more than 5 sensors
comment: Sensor Removal Result: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Sensor Removal All Request
description: This is the request to remove all provisioned sensors at once
comment: Sensor Removal All Request: Single numeric writable value.

name: Sensor Removal All Result
description: This is the sensor removal all result.
comment: Sensor Removal All Result: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Voice Diagnostics - Wake Word and Command Counts
description: This ERD contains a running count of the total times the wake word was activated as well as the total times a successful command was initiated. These values roll over once they hit their max value and are not cleared otherwise.
comment: Auto-suggested: Voice Diagnostics - Wake Word and Command Counts

name: Voice Diagnostics - Total Android Platform Voice Command Activations
description: This ERD contains a running count of the total times a successful command was initiated. These values roll over once they hit their max value and are not cleared otherwise.
comment: Auto-suggested: Voice Diagnostics - Total Android Platform Voice Command Activations

name: Voice Diagnostics - Total Appliance Specific Voice Command Activations
description: This ERD contains a running count of the total times a successful command was initiated. These values roll over once they hit their max value and are not cleared otherwise.
comment: Auto-suggested: Voice Diagnostics - Total Appliance Specific Voice Command Activations

name: Voice Feature Enable Request
description: This is used to enable the local voice control feature on appliances
comment: Auto-suggested: Voice Feature Enable Request

name: Voice Features Enable Status
description: This is used to enable the local voice control feature on appliances
comment: Auto-suggested: Voice Features Enable Status

name: System Mode
description: The current mode of the system.
comment: System Mode: Enum writable select.

name: Zoneline On/Off Control
description: Control the Zoneline unit's state.
comment: Zoneline On/Off Control: Boolean writable switch.

name: Target Heating Temperature
description: The desired heating temperature.
comment: Target Heating Temperature: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Target Cooling Temperature
description: The desired cooling temperature. The units (Centigrade or Fahrenheit) should match what is reported by erd 0x0007
comment: Target Cooling Temperature: Temperature in Fahrenheit.

name: Cooling Fan Mode
description: The desired mode for the fan in Cooling mode. Can be read at any time.
comment: Cooling Fan Mode: Enum writable select.

name: Fan-Only Fan Mode
description: The desired mode for the fan in Fan-Only mode. Can be read at any time.
comment: Fan-Only Fan Mode: Enum writable select.

name: Heating Fan Mode
description: The desired mode for the fan in Heating mode. Can be read at any time.
comment: Heating Fan Mode: Enum writable select.

name: Relay Status
description: Specifies which relays are currently turned on.
comment: High confidence: Relay State bitmask (16-bit). Bits: 0=External Fan, 1=DLB, 2=ICR, 3=Reversing Valve, 4=Compressor, 5=2.5kW, 6=1.5kW, 7=1kW, 14=24VAC Select, 15=UVC. Multiple binary_sensor entities can be derived by extracting individual bits.

name: Compressor run time in seconds
description: Cumulative time the compressor has run for
comment: Compressor run time in seconds: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Resistance heater run time in seconds
description: Cumulative time the resistance heater has run for
comment: Resistance heater run time in seconds: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Inside fan run time in seconds
description: Cumulative time the inside fan has run for
comment: Inside fan run time in seconds: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Outside fan run time in seconds
description: Cumulative time the outside fan has run for
comment: Outside fan run time in seconds: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Capacity in BTU/h
description: Indicates the unit capacity in BTU per hour (BTU/h)
comment: Capacity in BTU/h: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Air Conditioner Cycle Count
description: The number of times the set temperature has been satisfied
comment: Air Conditioner Cycle Count: Counter/count sensor.

name: Air Purifier Request
description: Identifies the type of air purification to be turned on by bit.
comment: Air Purifier Request: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Energy Conservation Request
description: A configurable-level of Eco Energy Savings. This applies to any running mode.
comment: Energy Conservation Request: Enum writable select.

name: Air Purifier Status
description: Used to read the status of the Air Purifier.
comment: Air Purifier Status: Multi-field boolean sensor, consider splitting into individual binary_sensors.

name: Energy Conservation Status
description: Used to read the status of the Energy Conservation.
comment: Energy Conservation Status: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Inside ambient temperature
description: Current inside ambient temperature in degrees F x 10. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Read-only inside ambient temperature; description explicitly states 'degrees F x 10'. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: Inside coil temperature
description: Current inside coil temperature in degrees F x 10. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Read-only inside coil temperature; description explicitly states 'degrees F x 10'. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: Outside ambient temperature
description: Current outside ambient temperature in degrees F x 10. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Read-only outside ambient temperature; description explicitly states 'degrees F x 10'. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: Outside coil temperature
description: Current outside coil temperature in degrees F x 10. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Read-only outside coil temperature; description explicitly states 'degrees F x 10'. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: Processed Inside ambient temperature
description: Processed inside ambient temperature in degrees F x 10.
comment: High confidence: Read-only processed inside ambient temperature; description explicitly states 'degrees F x 10'. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: Indoor Outlet temperature
description: Indoor Outlet temperature.
comment: High confidence: Read-only indoor outlet temperature; YAML usage confirms x10 scaling. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: Processed Outside Ambient Temperature
description: Processed outside ambient temperature in degrees F x 10.
comment: High confidence: Read-only processed outside ambient temperature; description explicitly states 'degrees F x 10'. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: Indoor Coil Vapor Temperature
description: Current indoor coil vapor temperature in degrees F x 10. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Read-only indoor coil vapor temperature; description explicitly states 'degrees F x 10'. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: Outdoor Coil Vapor Temperature
description: Current outdoor coil vapor temperature in degrees F x 10. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Read-only outdoor coil vapor temperature; description explicitly states 'degrees F x 10'. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: Humidity Percentage
description: Current humidity percentage. If Sensor Lock ERD (0x7042) is set, this is writable.
comment: High confidence: Read-only relative humidity percentage (0-100%). Maps to a sensor with device_class 'humidity'.

name: Suction Temperature
description: Current suction temperature in degrees F x 10.
comment: High confidence: Read-only suction temperature; description states 'degrees F x 10'. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.

name: Outdoor Coil Liquid temperature
description: Outdoor Coil Liquid temperature.
comment: High confidence: Read-only outdoor coil liquid temperature; YAML usage confirms x10 scaling consistent with other coil temperatures.

name: Processed indoor ambient temperature (rounded)
description: Processed indoor ambient temperature in degrees F, updated every 10 seconds.

data.name: Indoor ambient temperature in degrees F

comment: High confidence: Read-only processed indoor ambient temperature (rounded integer); description states 'degrees F' with no scaling. Raw value = actual degF.

name: Processed outdoor ambient temperature (rounded)
description: Processed outdoor ambient temperature in degrees F, updated every 10 seconds.

data.name: Outdoor ambient temperature in degrees F

comment: High confidence: Read-only processed outdoor ambient temperature (rounded integer); description states 'degrees F' with no scaling. Raw value = actual degF.

name: Estimated External Thermostat Target Setpoint Temperature
description: The estimated external thermostat target setpoint temperature.
comment: Medium confidence: Read-only estimated external thermostat target setpoint; assumed degF without explicit scaling.

name: Target Dew Point temperature
description: Target Dew Point temperature.
comment: Medium confidence: Read-only target dew point temperature; assumed degF without explicit scaling.

name: Measured Dew Point temperature
description: Measured Dew Point temperature.
comment: High confidence: Read-only measured dew point temperature; YAML usage confirms x10 scaling. Divide raw i16 by 10 to get degF.
